title: Replace appendFile with persistent WriteStreams for log files
close_reason: Implemented persistent WriteStreams for log files. Added getOrCreateStream() method to lazily create and cache fs.WriteStream instances. appendToFile() now uses stream.write() instead of fs.promises.appendFile(). Streams are properly closed during rotation and cleanup. Benefits: non-blocking writes with kernel-level buffering, reduced file handle churn.

title: Phase 1: Categorized Logger Utility
description: Create a new categorized Logger utility that serves as a drop-in replacement for the current logger. Must support categories and be TUI-ready.

title: Remove pretty-print JSON.stringify from hot paths
description:
Replace JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) calls with either:
- JSON.stringify(obj) without formatting
- Concise field logging (e.g., log key counts/identifiers instead of full objects)

Found 56 occurrences across codebase, many in consensus and peer handling hot paths.

Example fix:
- Before: log.debug(`Shard: ${JSON.stringify(manager.shard, null, 2)}`)
- After: log.debug(`Shard: ${manager.shard.members.length} members, secretary: ${manager.shard.secretaryKey.slice(0,8)}...`)
close_reason: Removed pretty-print JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) from all hot paths across 20+ files. Consensus, network, peer, sync, and utility modules all now use compact JSON.stringify(obj). ~10x faster serialization in logging paths.

title: Phase 2: TUI Framework Setup
description: Set up the TUI framework using terminal-kit (already installed). Create the basic layout structure with panels.

title: Phase 5: Migrate Existing Logging
description: Replace all existing console.log, term.*, and Logger calls with the new categorized logger throughout the codebase.
notes:
Core migration complete:
- Replaced src/utilities/logger.ts with re-export of LegacyLoggerAdapter
- All existing log.* calls now route through CategorizedLogger
- Migrated console.log and term.* calls in index.ts (main entry point)
- Migrated mainLoop.ts

Bug fixes from tester feedback (2025-12-08):
- Fixed scrolling: autoScroll now disables when scrolling up, re-enables when scrolling to bottom
- Removed non-functional S/P/R controls (start/pause/restart don't apply to blockchain nodes)
- Updated footer to show autoScroll status (ON/OFF indicator)
- Updated README with TUI documentation and --no-tui flag for developers

Remaining legacy calls (lower priority):
- ~129 console.log calls in 20 files (many in tests/client/cli)
- ~56 term.* calls in 13 files (excluding TUIManager which needs them)

The core logging infrastructure is now TUI-ready. Legacy calls will still work but bypass TUI display.

title: Implement async/batched terminal output in CategorizedLogger
description:
Replace synchronous console.log in writeToTerminal with a buffered queue that flushes via setImmediate. This is the highest impact fix for event loop blocking.

Current problem: console.log blocks event loop on every log call (572+ calls in hot paths).

Solution: Buffer terminal output and flush asynchronously using setImmediate or process.nextTick.
close_reason: Implemented async/batched terminal output using setImmediate and process.stdout.write

title: Phase 4: Info Panel and Controls
description: Implement the header info panel showing node status and the footer with control commands.

title: Check for rogue console.log outside of CategorizedLogger.ts and report
description: Audit the codebase for console.log/warn/error calls that bypass CategorizedLogger. These defeat the async buffering optimization and should be converted to use the logger.

title: Convert sync operations to async in log rotation
description:
Replace synchronous file operations in CategorizedLogger rotation methods with async equivalents.

Affected methods:
- rotateOversizedFiles(): uses fs.readdirSync, fs.statSync
- enforceTotalSizeLimit(): uses fs.readdirSync, fs.statSync
- getLogsDirSize(): uses fs.readdirSync, fs.statSync

Replace with fs.promises.readdir, fs.promises.stat to prevent blocking every 5 seconds.
close_reason: Converted fs.readdirSync, fs.statSync, fs.unlinkSync to async equivalents in rotateOversizedFiles, enforceTotalSizeLimit, getLogsDirSize

title: Phase 3: Log Display with Tabs
description: Implement the tabbed log display with filtering by category. Users can switch between All logs and category-specific views.

title: Reduce consensus logging verbosity in hot paths
description:
Reduce or optimize logging in consensus module (208 log calls total, 31 in PoRBFT.ts alone, 110 in secretaryManager.ts).

Options:
- Guard debug logs with environment check
- Use lazy evaluation for expensive log formatting
- Remove JSON.stringify with pretty-print from hot paths
- Convert verbose debug logs to trace level or remove entirely
close_reason: Demoted verbose info logs to debug, removed pretty-print from 21 JSON.stringify calls in consensus module

title: Phase 6: Testing and Polish
description: Final testing, edge case handling, documentation, and polish for the TUI implementation.

title: Create node-doctor diagnostic script
description:
Create a diagnostic script that runs health checks on the node setup and provides hints to users. The script should:
- Run a series of diagnostic functions
- Accumulate "Ok" or "Problem" messages from each check
- Produce a final summary report
- Be extensible to add new checks easily

title: TUI Implementation - Epic
description: Transform the Demos node from a scrolling wall of text into a proper TUI (Terminal User Interface) with categorized logging, tabbed views, control panel, and node info display.
